title: Human
overview: It's past midnight and Dani Ferris is a woman all alone, away from home. A woman who's tired as hell, wanting nothing but a little tease of digital debauchery before shutting her eyes. A woman not even remotely prepared for the roller coaster of emotions she's about to ride with a front-row seat.  Sleep? Lol. Nope. Tonight is a night for friends, lovers, enemies, frenemies?, little guns, bigger guns, body parts, body fluids, body solids, love, hate, life, death, and things a hell of a lot more super than natural.  A night Dani will never forget. And neither will he.
